instruction: Optimize a real-time stock ticker SwiftUI view for iOS 26 using TimelineView and .performanceSensitive() to minimize unnecessary updates.
Demonstrate high-performance drawing of a dynamic waveform using Canvas in SwiftUI for iOS 26, with efficient state management.
Show how to structure a SwiftUI view hierarchy to avoid unnecessary updates by isolating expensive subviews with .performanceSensitive() and @Binding.
Implement a high-frequency animation in SwiftUI for iOS 26 using TimelineView and Canvas, ensuring smooth performance.
Demonstrate best practices for using .performanceSensitive() in a SwiftUI list with dynamic filtering and sorting.
Optimize a SwiftUI chart rendering thousands of data points using Canvas and .performanceSensitive() for iOS 26.
Show how to use .performanceSensitive() to optimize a SwiftUI view that updates in response to device motion using CoreMotion.
Implement a custom SwiftUI view that uses TimelineView to efficiently update a countdown timer, avoiding unnecessary redraws.
Demonstrate how to use Canvas and TimelineView together for a high-performance, real-time analog clock in SwiftUI for iOS 26.
Show how to use .performanceSensitive() to optimize a SwiftUI view that displays a rapidly updating sensor value from Combine.
